description: A gentle mechanical frog guardian who keeps watch over a wooden talisman plaque shrine, with brass bells, hanging charms, sprout, and quiet shrine-spirit calm kept intact as one inseparable scene pet.

idle.notes: Calm guardian idle with tiny breathing and blink while Mori stays perched on the plaque roof.

walk.notes: Directional scene-glide rows used for drag-facing and motion semantics; Mori remains attached to the shrine scene rather than literally walking.

curious.notes: Soft forward lean and watchful peeking from the roof ridge.

happy.notes: Gentle pleased smile with a tiny buoyant lift and light charm and bell sway.

sleep.notes: Peaceful guardian nap on the roof ridge with closed eyes and minimal movement.

observe.notes: Slightly more deliberate scanning loop while Mori keeps watch over the plaque.

jump.notes: Short roof-bounce hop that keeps Mori physically attached to the shrine scene in every frame.

shrine-rest.notes: Deeper settled rest across the roof ridge, repurposing the fixed atlas row into a peaceful shrine-rest loop.

walk_right.notes: Whole plaque-shrine scene glides right while the frog remains guarding the roof.

walk_left.notes: Whole plaque-shrine scene glides left while the frog remains guarding the roof.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true-facing scene-glide rows, not a literal walk cycle.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses the true left-facing shrine scene row
right drag uses the true right-facing shrine scene row
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
the frog, plaque roof, front rune board, side charm, lower bell, sprout, and grass base remain coordinated in both directions
Mori stays readable at small size as a frog guarding a wooden talisman plaque shrine

baseSceneIdentity.subject: small round mechanical frog guardian
baseSceneIdentity.posture: perched on the wooden plaque shrine roof ridge
props: wooden plaque shrine with roof cap
baseSceneIdentity.mood: quiet, patient, observant, gentle shrine guardian and record-keeper spirit
